title: viola verticillata
intro: Viola verticillata, also known as the whorled pansy, is a perennial plant species in the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola verticillata include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
